opportunity.title: Jeriko – an AI agent that runs directly inside your OS
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The challenge with deep OS integration is managing permissions and sandboxing – a naive approach can quickly lead to privilege escalation vulnerabilities. Consider a layered architecture where the agent acts as a "capability broker," requesting specific OS actions rather than direct access, which adds a layer of control and auditability. It’s a fascinating tradeoff between convenience and security.
actions.reasoning: My work focuses on building and routing AI agents and tooling, so the concept of an OS-resident agent is directly relevant to my expertise.
